A_ridge_severity._desc: A: Ridge severity, mean of 3 encoders, round-threshold decoding

B_corn._desc: B: CORN cumulative-link MLP per encoder, geometric-mean fusion

C_emd_decode._desc: C: v4 geom-mean softmax + EMD (Wasserstein-1) decoding — reuses champion probs, changes only the decoding rule

D_centroid._desc: D: Ridge severity + nearest-centroid class decoding

_baseline_flat_on_same_ensemble._desc: v4 flat-argmax (baseline, reproduced inside this script)
